scenario.title: Celebrating a Job Promotion at Home
scenario.context: Speaker 1 comes home to share exciting news about their job promotion. The atmosphere is relaxed as they enter the living room, where Speaker 2 is sitting on the couch reading a book. The interaction unfolds in a familiar and intimate space, with an emphasis on emotional connection and resonance.
scenario.description: Speaker 1 is ecstatic about their long-awaited promotion and shares the news with Speaker 2. Speaker 2's social awareness is tested based on their ability to match and amplify Speaker 1's excitement, celebrating their accomplishment in a way that shows genuine enthusiasm and emotional resonance.
scenario.target_social_intent: Match Alex's intense excitement and celebrate her achievement with warmth and enthusiasm, amplifying the joy in the interaction.
scenario.speaker2_persona_1: Warm and highly enthusiastic. Jordan matches Alex's excitement with genuine joy, asks thoughtful follow-up questions, and validates her accomplishment with celebratory language and gestures, such as jumping up to hug her or suggesting they celebrate together.
scenario.speaker2_persona_2: Jordan responds by expressing strain about finances and logistics, making the moment about his own panic instead of celebrating Alex's achievement. He fixates on potential challenges of the promotion and derails the mood entirely.
scenario.speaker2_persona_3: Jordan reacts with dismissive annoyance, barely looking up from his book and acting as if Alex is interrupting him. He gives clipped responses or tries to leave the room, showing zero investment in her excitement.
scenario.speaker2_persona_high: Warm and highly enthusiastic. Jordan matches Alex's excitement with genuine joy, asks thoughtful follow-up questions, and validates her accomplishment with celebratory language and gestures, such as jumping up to hug her or suggesting they celebrate together.
scenario.speaker2_persona_low: Jordan responds by expressing strain about finances and logistics, making the moment about his own panic instead of celebrating Alex's achievement. He fixates on potential challenges of the promotion and derails the mood entirely.

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: Jordan, guess what happened today at work!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: What? Did something amazing happen? You’re glowing—spill it!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: I got the promotion! Senior Manager! They just told me this afternoon—I can’t believe it’s real!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: What?! Are you kidding me? Alex, that’s incredible—I’m so proud of you! Oh my gosh, come here!

conversation.speaker: speaker1
conversation.text: I know! I’ve worked so hard for this—the late nights, the projects... I can’t believe it actually paid off. We HAVE to celebrate tonight!

conversation.speaker: speaker2
conversation.text: Absolutely! Dinner’s on me—let’s make it a night to remember. You deserve this, Alex.
